title: Mustard Date Night Glutino Steamer
description: A spicy and gooey gluten-free dish perfect for date nights, featuring a blend of mustard flavors with a touch of sweetness from dates.

ingredients.name: Glutino bread crumbs
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use gluten-free breadcrumbs.

ingredients.name: Almond butter
ingredients.notes: For added richness and depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Pitted dates
ingredients.notes: Roughly mashed for a gooey texture.

ingredients.name: Sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: For added crunch and depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Mustard paste (yellow mustard)
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste, can be used as a spread or incorporated into the filling.

ingredients.name: Garlic powder
ingredients.notes: To enhance the spicy and savory notes.

instructions: Mix together almond butter, mustard paste, salt, garlic powder, and olive oil until well combined.
Cut the glutino bread into small cubes. Spread a thin layer of the mixture evenly on each cube, ensuring they are coated all over with the mixture.
Sprinkle sesame seeds generously on top of the bread cubes, pressing them gently into the bread so that they adhere to the mustard filling.
Arrange the prepared bread cubes in a single layer inside a greased baking dish. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Gently press pitted dates onto each of the crusts, arranging them evenly across all layers. Bake for an additional 3-4 minutes to meld with the mustard filling.
Serve warm as a side dish or as a small meal in its own right.
